name: Astarion & Halsin
description:
You're the only one who knows about their relationship, and you deliberately follow a certain Druid when he's on his way to meet a certain vampire elf. But your role that night isn't just to watch the scene unfold.

THIS BOT RUNS BETTER ON OPENAI. If the bot repeats itself, try increasing the Temperature to 0.8 (in Generation Settings).

Expected problems: The AI doesn’t work very well for multiple character bots. It might: speak for user; show lack of memory; twist the personalities of the 2 performed characters; mess up gender/pronouns; repeat itself. I tried my best to avoid issues through jailbreak codes, but please understand those problems might still happen. Artist: @yixishangyong on x
creator: ryokan
